channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Apple CEO defends confidentiality practices
item.description: A summary of key business and market developments.

item.title: SEON CEO discusses prediction market trends
item.description: The expansion of prediction markets is outpacing regulatory frameworks, potentially leading to new CFTC regulations.

item.title: Starbucks Focuses on Employee Relations
item.description: A Fortune report details business and market trends.

item.title: Researcher Studies Cancer in Fruit Flies
item.description: A scientist is researching cancer using fruit flies, creating a prototype with accessible materials.
